title: ITR-1, 2, 3, and 4 for AY 2026-27 Now Live on E-filing Portal!
content:
# ITR-1, 2, 3, and 4 for AY 2026-27 Now Live on E-filing Portal!

Ek important update hai! Income Tax Department ne Assessment Year (AY) 2026-27 ke liye ITR-1, ITR-2, ITR-3, aur ITR-4 forms e-filing portal par live kar diye hain. Taxpayers ab apne income tax returns file kar sakte hain for the financial year 2025-26.

Here are the key details:

*   **Forms Made Live:** ITR-1 (Sahaj), ITR-2, ITR-3, and ITR-4 (Sugam).
*   **Applicable Assessment Year:** AY 2026-27 (corresponding to Financial Year 2025-26).
*   **Filing Options:** Both Excel Utilities, Online filing, and Offline filing options are now enabled on the e-filing portal. This means you can either use the online mode directly or download the offline utility to prepare your return and then upload it.
*   **What this means:** The process for filing your Income Tax Returns for AY 2026-27 has officially commenced. Taxpayers are advised to start preparing their documents to file their returns well within the due dates.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in)

*Published on: 6 July 2026*
